column3: IF: Small Parcel Move to Step 2 to provide return tracking in order. IF: Large Parcel We do not have return tracking but the supplier will be contacted to schedule the return shipment. If the supplier reports not receiving a return on an LTL item and the return is 45+ days old then transfer to claims as the supplier only has 60 days to dispute the deduction.

From the Product tab, expand the Service History section to open the return details. You will find the tracking for the returned item here, (Visual 2.1; Tip 1) Tip 1: This will be different to the tracking information listed in the Destination section (unless the item was RTS).
Update the Supplier using the Return_Tracking template.
Move to the Resolve Ticket tab.
